Multiple black walnut trees with very big fruit. Access: Public.

Barely visible from the path but extremely acessible from the water level. Several black raspberry plants north of several blackberry plants. Blackberries just starting to ripen mid-July. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-unknown.

Seems like just one blueberry plant in this little region, with four fat, ripe berries and bare any green ones. Go to the south side of the pond trail and the sandy beach area for many, many more blueberries. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-August.
A dozen blueberry bushes spread out above the retaining wall. Some ripe by mid-July, many others still green on the bushes. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-August.

Apple tree in the Home Depot parking lot at the corner of Chrysler and Speen Street. Apple was small, sweetish, and slightly astringent but possibly underripe (9/4/17). Will try again in a week.

Blackberry bush along Cochituate Rail Trail stretch behind Home Depot. First noticed early July 2022. Partially concealed by other foliage, easiest to spot when approaching facing northwest.
